title: Reduce the Size of Large Documents

codeBlocks.content:
// movies collection

{
    "_id": 123,
    "title": "2001: A Space Odyssey",
    "poster": <url>,
    "director": "Stanley Kubrick",
    "release_year": 1968,
    "box_office_usd": 146000000,
    "countries_released": [
        "United States",
        ...
    ],
    "cast": [
        "Keir Dullea",
        ...
    ],
    "crew": [
         "Ray Lovejoy",
         ...
    ],
    ...

}

// movie_metadata collection

{
    "_id": <object_id>,
    "movie_id": 123, // reference to a movies document
    "director": "Stanley Kubrick",
    "release_year": 1968,
    "box_office_usd": 146000000,
    "countries_released": [
        "United States",
        ...
    ],
    "cast": [
        "Keir Dullea",
        ...
    ],
    "crew": [
         "Ray Lovejoy",
         ...
    ],
    ...

}
